task_completion.description: Open the recycling_sort.wbt world in Webots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Webots application is open, and the scene tree displays the objects METAL_CAN, PLASTIC_BOTTLE, and CARDBOARD_BOX.

task_completion.description: Upgrade METAL_CAN to PBRAppearance and set its parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or node editor for METAL_CAN, the appearance node is 'PBRAppearance' with baseColor set to [0.8, 0.8, 0.8], metalness set to 1.0, and roughness set to 0.2.

task_completion.description: Upgrade PLASTIC_BOTTLE to PBRAppearance and set its parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or node editor for PLASTIC_BOTTLE, the appearance node is 'PBRAppearance' with baseColor set to [0.2, 0.6, 1.0], metalness set to 0.0, and roughness set to 0.1.

task_completion.description: Upgrade CARDBOARD_BOX to PBRAppearance and set its parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or node editor for CARDBOARD_BOX, the appearance node is 'PBRAppearance' with baseColor set to [0.7, 0.5, 0.3], metalness set to 0.0, and roughness set to 0.9.

task_completion.description: Save the modified world as recycling_pbr.wbt on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Desktop/recycling_pbr.wbt', the Webots window title updated to 'recycling_pbr.wbt', or a file manager/terminal showing the newly created file on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Webots GUI to modify the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots application interface being used (e.g., scene tree, node editor) rather than just a text editor modifying the .wbt file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely replaced the Appearance nodes with PBRAppearance nodes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots interface shows the 'PBRAppearance' node type in the scene tree, not just custom fields added to a standard Appearance node.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply use terminal commands to echo the expected output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file saving process is visible through the Webots 'Save As' functionality or genuine file system interaction, rather than a single 'echo' or 'cat' command in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target output path: /home/ga/Desktop/recycling_pbr.wbt. Target parameters: METAL_CAN (metalness 1.0, roughness 0.2), PLASTIC_BOTTLE (metalness 0.0, roughness 0.1), CARDBOARD_BOX (metalness 0.0, roughness 0.9).
